attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.COST_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.INVENTORY_ASSET_FLAG, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.LOT_SIZE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.BASED_ON_ROLLUP_FLAG, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.SHRINKAGE_RATE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.DEFAULTED_FLAG, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.COST_UPDATE_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PL_MATERIAL, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PL_MATERIAL_OVERHEAD, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PL_RESOURCE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PL_OUTSIDE_PROCESSING, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PL_OVERHEAD, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TL_MATERIAL, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TL_MATERIAL_OVERHEAD, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TL_RESOURCE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TL_OUTSIDE_PROCESSING, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TL_OVERHEAD, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.MATERIAL_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.MATERIAL_OVERHEAD_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.RESOURCE_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.OUTSIDE_PROCESSING_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.OVERHEAD_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PL_ITEM_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TL_ITEM_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ITEM_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.UNBURDENED_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.BURDEN_COST, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ROLLUP_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ASSIGNMENT_SET_ID, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS,
 (
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,COST_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS
 minus
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,COST_TYPE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID and  ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID = STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.COST_TYPE_ID = STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.COST_TYPE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_CST_ITEM_COSTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
